title: rubus subinermoides
intro: Rubus subinermoides, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan dewberry, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Rubus. This plant is native to the Himalayan region and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rubus subinermoides include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat a range of health conditions.
